name: Jeff Hall
title: Lead QA Engineer
summaryIntro: Several years of experience in Web and Client/Server Testing with thorough understanding of both SDLC and Agile project methodologies. Expertise in software testing and process development of QA in SDLC environment.
summaryQualifications: Excellent knowledge and working experience with test strategies, test planning, test execution, test results analysis and defect management
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with excellent communication and comprehensive understanding of different phases of project life cycle
Experience with Manual testing, Backend Testing and Application Development
Working knowledge of entire Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Quality Assurance Life Cycle (QALC)
Accessibility Testing for Front end websites using JAWS, NVDA, Talkback, Voiceover
Expertise in analyzing Business and System Requirements specification
Proficient in reviewing and documentation of system test plans, defining test procedures and creating test cases
Highly proficient with manual testing and as well as some knowledge in automation testing
Experience in web-based and client/server applications
Performed GUI, Functional, Integration, Regression, Smoke and sanity testing, UAT
Proficient in problem solving, bug tracking, and reporting using Test Director, Quality Center and JIRA
Work extensively with Development team and project teams to resolve reported issues
SQL, JSON script writing utilizing MSSQL, MYSQL, Postman and SOAP
Proficient in email testing platforms: Litmus, Email on Acid
Strong knowledge of HTML and CSS for email template troubleshooting
Experience with email marketing platforms: AEM and Salesforce
A/B testing methodologies and performance metrics analysis

education.detail: Computer animation and multimedia studies using high end graphics workstations such as Silicon Graphics and Sun Microsystems; software including Adobe Photoshop and 3D Studio Max.

Applied Associates in Business Management. Additional courses in Computer Science, Math, History, Speech and Communication, Creative Writing. Also occasionally attend continuing education courses for IT advancement.
